title: Dependency auto-changes date to exclude weekends

posts.author: flip904 (Jacob K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I am trying to figure out how to workaround the setting that changes the dependency based on weekends. Essentially- the system accounts for weekends and pushes the date to “skip” weekends.

I do need to keep the “work week” setting on, which does not allow items to be scheduled for weekend days

Loom video below showing the issue:

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @flip904 Can you quickly change the settings to not inculde weekends?

image1056×871 124 KB

Support

Dependencies on monday.com

8 min read Feature     Do you have items on your board with due dates that are dependent on one another? Can one item not start until the other is complete? That's where dependencies comes in...

image407×596 29.3 KB

To work around the weekend dependency issue while keeping the “work week” setting enabled, you can try the following approach:

  1. Adjust the Dependency Lag/Lead Time:
  • In your dependency settings, you can manually adjust the lag or lead time to compensate for the weekend days. For example, if a task is being pushed by two days due to the weekend, set a negative lag (-2 days) to offset it.
